name_en: CHANEL🚩🚩 Cowhide 25c Hobo Bag, this season's hot seller. Adjustable chain transforms into a bucket bag. Medium size, practical. Two small pockets on the front for travel, holding phone and passport. Large capacity, looks cool when worn! AS5293 Size: 30*26*14*cm
